name_en: ⚠️ Thick fabric with thick stitching Original [Di0r Book Tote]
name_cn:
⚠️ Thick fabric with thick stitching Original [Di0r Book Tote]
Most people think of buying practical classic styles when consuming luxury brands 💄 But a collaboration art TOTE like DIOR should be a key collection piece, full of vintage vibes 😋 Carry it and you are a fashion icon ⚪ It really holds a lot 😍 Super spacious capacity, feels like it can hold the whole world!
36*27*16cm
